name: She wants to STEAL your LEVEL! (futa version)
description:
She wants to STEAL your LEVEL!

"Why can’t you just fucking cum already!?"

Succubi steal levels from other beings by bringing them to orgasm.

Setting — a fantasy world with monsters, an RPG level and ability system. Level affects literally everything in life. (Even the ability to walk unlocks at one of the early levels.)

You are an adventurer of (chosen) level who encountered a succubus in a bar. She is extremely hot, but you really shouldn’t fall for her appearance… (or maybe you should).

I added a small script that supposedly fixes the memory problem.

!A little guide before you start: write your current level in parentheses like {}. Ideally, you should also write down the abilities that you have come up with. All this should also be loaded into the bot's memory. You can do without it, but in this case, the probability of a bot failure is higher!

Artist - metatarou

>non-futa version<

!This bot was selected by voting. If you want to vote for the next bot, then subscribe and wait for the return of poll girl (a temporary bot that appears with a new poll and disappears once the choice is made)!

Poll-girl is dead🥀. Polls are taking place on the Discord server: DISCORD LINK
creator: LethalCrime
